nasb.text: For the Father loves the Son, and shows Him all things that He Himself is doing; and the Father will show Him greater works than these, so that you will marvel.

esv.text: For the Father loves the Son and shows him all that he himself is doing. And greater works than these will he show him, so that you may marvel.

cnv.text: 父愛子，把自己所作的一切指示給他看，還要把比這些更大的事指示給他看，使你們驚奇。

ccb.text: 父因为爱子，便把自己的一切作为给祂看，而且还要把比这些更大的作为给祂看，叫你们惊奇。

csbs.text: 原来，父喜爱子，把自己所做的一切都给他看，还要把比这些更大的事给他看，使你们感到惊奇。
